text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 3 

ALCO_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Alcohol Use Disorders Indicator — Medicare Only Data 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only 
Medicare data, for having alcohol use disorder as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ALCO_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: ALCO_MEDICARE 

TYPE:
